single_object_rule: Only the Arcane Bore mechanism and its inseparable base/output/GUI/render paths were changed.
build_blocker: Gradle Wrapper could not resolve services.gradle.org; active sandbox Java is OpenJDK 21.0.10 while the project requires JDK 17.

confirmed_original_contracts.targeting: 2-degree expanding/reversing rotated spiral, radius 2+Enlarge, depth 64, first collidable non-unbreakable target
confirmed_original_contracts.timing: max(10-speed, floor(hardness*2)-speed*2), multiplied by 4 without acceleration
confirmed_original_contracts.acceleration: drain 100 Perditio centivis and divide by 5; if still below 20 consume one Perditio essentia for +20
confirmed_original_contracts.tools: Excavation focus plus damageable pickaxe with damage+1 < maxDamage; Potency+Efficiency, Treasure/Fortune maximum, Silk Touch override
confirmed_original_contracts.repair: fake player FakeThaumcraftBore; repair every 40 ticks; vis refill every 5 ticks; inventoryTick even without redstone
confirmed_original_contracts.drops: Block drops plus nearby item entities; optional Native Clusters; inventory insertion through base nozzle then exact ejection velocity
confirmed_original_contracts.nbt: orientation, baseOrientation, Inventory list with Slot byte, SpeedyTime short; spiral is not persisted
confirmed_original_contracts.base: all faces connect, output face suction 0, other faces Perditio suction 128, first blocked connectable tube aborts draw
confirmed_original_contracts.gui: 176x141; slots 26,18 and 74,18; damaged overlay 184,0; half-scale Width/Speed/Other properties labels
confirmed_original_contracts.visual: separate mount/nozzle/emitter, focus knob, three vortex layers, translucent jar core and two-colour bore beam
confirmed_original_contracts.recipes: ArcaneBoreBase WIW/IDI/WIW with greatwood/iron/oak log, Aer10 Ordo10; ArcaneBore infusion instability 4

corrected_port_deviations: square sorted target lanes replaced by original rotated spiral
added aura-vis acceleration before all power/tool checks and exact Perditio essentia fallback
added unpowered machine repair and fake-player item tick path
added Elemental Pickaxe/Dowsing Native Cluster path and exact chance formula
restored nearby ItemEntity collection and nozzle-first output/ejection
restored vertical-only placement on an Arcane Bore Base, six-direction wand rotation and extended shape
replaced Forge-only inventory compound/SpiralIndex persistence with original NBT plus legacy migration
restored all-face base suction and independently rotated nozzle renderer
restored exact GUI, common rarity and corrected base recipe mapping
restored original Bore/vortex/jar textures, separated model components, beam, core and impact particles

static_evidence.texture_hashes: Bore.png, gui_arcanebore.png, vortex.png and jar.png match original SHA-256
